hook.zh: 儿童英语三国【移驾许昌】
hook.en: Three Kingdoms English: Move to Xuchang
hook.visual_keyword: 三国 Q版 标题卡 移驾许昌 3D动画

segments.en: Your majesty, I have a report. Yang Feng and Han Xian helped protect you. But now they are rude and bossy. Please punish them.
segments.zh: 陛下，臣有本奏。杨奉、韩暹曾护驾有功，如今却跋扈无礼，请陛下严惩。
segments.visual_keyword: 杨奉 韩暹 汉献帝 3D Q版三国

segments.en: Yang Feng, you're lying! You too. Stay or leave — the choice is yours. Yang Feng, you'll pay for this!
segments.zh: 杨奉，你撒谎！你也是。去或留，你自己选。杨奉，你会付出代价！

segments.en: Send for Xu Huang. Yes, general! Which group of generals does Xu Huang belong to?
segments.zh: 传徐晃来。遵命，将军！徐晃属于哪一类将军？
segments.visual_keyword: 徐晃 曹操 3D Q版三国

segments.en: A, the five tiger generals. B, the five elite generals. C, the five dragon generals.
segments.zh: A，五虎上将。B，五子良将。C，五龙上将。
segments.visual_keyword: 选择题 五子良将 3D Q版

segments.en: Xu Huang, Yang Feng can't protect you. Join me and you'll be safe.
segments.zh: 徐晃，杨奉保护不了你。跟我，你就安全。
segments.visual_keyword: 曹操 徐晃 招降 3D Q版

segments.en: I will serve you. Great! From now on, we fight together.
segments.zh: 愿效忠将军。好！从今以后，我们一起战斗。

segments.en: Luoyang is very old and broken now, and we don't have enough food. Could we move somewhere else?
segments.zh: 洛阳如今残破不堪，粮食也不够。能迁到别处吗？
segments.visual_keyword: 洛阳废墟 缺粮 3D Q版

segments.en: Xuchang has plenty of food and is your base. This is a great plan.
segments.zh: 许昌粮足，又是将军根基。这是好主意。
segments.visual_keyword: 许昌 粮仓 地图 3D Q版

segments.en: Your majesty, we have no food here. Please move to Xuchang.
segments.zh: 陛下，此处无粮，请移驾许昌。
segments.visual_keyword: 移驾许昌 汉献帝 3D Q版

segments.en: I will follow your plan, General Cao. Then let's set off today.
segments.zh: 朕听从曹将军之计。那今日便出发吧。
segments.visual_keyword: 皇家车队 出发 3D Q版

segments.en: I'm making Xu Huang our top general. Great decision, your majesty.
segments.zh: 朕封徐晃为大将。陛下英明。

segments.en: Instead of complaining, take a brave new step. Cao Cao's power grew from here.
segments.zh: 别抱怨，勇敢迈出新一步。曹操霸业，从此开始。
segments.visual_keyword: 曹操 霸业 许昌 3D Q版
